headline: A Look At Universal Health Services (UHS) Valuation After A Strong 2025 Earnings Report And Guidance
summary: Universal Health Services (UHS) is back in focus after its Q4 and full year 2025 earnings, where strong revenue and profit figures met a sharp share price drop on slightly mixed quarterly expectations. See our latest analysis for Universal Health Services. That sharp one day share price drop after earnings sits against a mixed backdrop, with a 7 day share price return of 10.58% decline, a 90 day share price return of 13.92% decline, a 1 year total shareholder return of 18.09% and a 3 year...
